ksa_text: Skill in translating business questions and customer requirements into structured analytical approaches, including defining data requirements, scoping analysis, and selecting appropriate methodology.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Applied Analytics & BI is an edge domain for the Director of Master Data Management, this skill KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.46) and conceptual alignment to include at the director level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Applied Analytics & BI), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.46). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Master Data Management versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Gartner analytics maturity model and BI leadership surveys confirm applied analytics and BI competencies for analytics leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Applied Analytics & BI appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Master Data Management.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI skill KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.46. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Director of Master Data Management.
